title: Neznámý titulek
content: Dante Leon and Kenta Iwamoto battled it out in one of the best ONE Championship welterweight matches imaginable at ONE Fight Night 42 on April 10th, 2026. It was a great booking that was always going to produce fireworks, just like it did the last time they met. The pair first faced each other in the AIGA Champions League Quarter-Final in 2023, and Leon won that by submitting Iwamoto with an armbar. Both men have improved since then and Iwamoto was out for revenge, with both men throwing everything they had at each other. Iwamoto came in with an excellent gameplan designed to beat Leon, and it looked like it might work at the start. Iwamoto was attempting to play a stifling top game with tons of pressure that could keep Leon on his back while also neutralizing the threat of leglocks. He was able to prevent Leon from having any meaningful offense for a while, but Leon was never really in danger. He was able to prevent all of Iwamoto’s passing attempts and as the match wore on, his own attacks were starting to gain more ground. Eventually he swept Iwamoto and tried to attack the legs straight after, but Iwamoto’s defense was on point. Leon switched things up and went for a triangle choke, locking it up and scoring the catch that won him a decision with seconds left on the clock. ONE Fight Night 42 Full Results Dzhabir Dzhabrailov defeats Chase Mann via Knockout – Punch Sam-A Gaiyanghadao defeats Elmehdi El Jamari via Knockout – Head Kick Suakim Pongsuphan PK defeats Vladimir Kuzmin via Decision – Unanimous Hiroba Minowa defeats Karen Ghazaryan via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Black Panther defeats Diego Paez via Decision – Split Dante Leon defeats Kenta Iwamoto via Decision – Unanimous Joshua Perreira defeats Gilbert Nakatani via Knockout – Spinning Backfist Dmitrii Kovtun defeats Mohanad Battbootti via Decision – Unanimous ONE Championship shared the footage of Dante Leon scoring a catch against Kenta Iwamoto in a recent post to their official Instagram account: View this post on Instagram Tags: Dante LeonKenta IwamotoONE Championship
